api.header: Execute {LINK} from external applications via simple HTTP queries.
api.key_warning: DO NOT share the key with anyone!
api.key_info: Copy it and keep it safe, Twitchat will not be able to show it again.
api.revoke_key_tt: This will invalidate previously generated key
api.revoke_error: Something went wrong while revoking the key. Please try again.
api.revoke_success:
The key has been successfully revoked.

Go to settings => connections => Twitchat API to generate a new one.
api.generate_error: Something went wrong while generating the key. Please try again.
api.tutorial_intro: Every request must be signed with your private key. The key itself is never sent over the network.
api.tutorial_step1: Build the JSON body with the action you want to trigger.
api.tutorial_step2: Construct the signature payload by concatenating the timestamp, action, and JSON body.
api.tutorial_step3: Send a POST request to the endpoint below.
api.tutorial_step4: Include these headers in your request.
api.tutorial_step5: Read {LINK} to know what you can do with the API.
